first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations, and the reasoning remains substantively the same. Both versions highlight the same core strengths (full-stack development, open-source work) and the same core concerns (lack of deep C++ experience, industrial automation, and specific standards). The minor variations in wording and the slight re-categorization of points between sections are consistent with ordinary run-to-run noise and do not reflect a change in the fundamental assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on their alma mater.
